query: INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, lastSignedIn, loginMethod) VALUES (CONCAT('maelle-mars-admin-', UUID()), 'Maelle Mars', 'maellemarsmedium@gmail.com', 'admin', NOW(), 'oauth') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin', lastSignedIn = NOW();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46qLADBRp6T678j.414b6f620258 --database LJnj9egkWpcGSwAXFPWMea --execute INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, lastSignedIn, loginMethod) VALUES (CONCAT('maelle-mars-admin-', UUID()), 'Maelle Mars', 'maellemarsmedium@gmail.com', 'admin', NOW(), 'oauth') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin', lastSignedIn = NOW();
